message.content: @startuml title Sequence Diagram: Internal state synchronization right header Authors: pw@zoi.de\nVersion: 0.1 package "Internal Service" { participant Sender participant IoTClient participant ShadowCallback } rectangle AWS Cloud #98FB98 { participant ShadowService } == client connection == Sender ->> IoTClient : connect() activate IoTClient IoTClient ->> ShadowCallback : on_connecet_wrapper() ShadowCallback --> IoTClient deactivate IoTClient note over ShadowCallback, ShadowService#LineOrange:red box end note IoTClient <-+ ShadowCallback : subscribe("AWS Shadow Topics") IoTClient ->> ShadowService : subscribe() activate ShadowService ShadowService -->> IoTClient IoTClient ->> ShadowCallback : on_subscribe_wrapper() activate ShadowCallback ShadowCallback -[hidden]x ShadowCallback : request_desired_state() == state retrival == shadowbox "#white:black;bold" as sb2 [[state retrieval]] {} sb2 .. shadowbox "#black:white;" as sbb2 [[]]{} sbb2 .u.[[#red][[#green][[]] ] SB2 <.. SBB2 publish(myclient/shadow/get) @enduml
